title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・姫の戦いは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Guess who dominated the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup. Me! OH YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't really change how everyone sees
me. Some people still won't accept me as a
princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why I'm going to keep running! I'm
going to be the princess I'm proud of and charge
into the future with a Princess☆Punch!
